notes: Generated by enumerating four-slot Crock Pot combinations with replacement.
Standard recipes are evaluated separately from Warly-only recipes so Warly dishes do not hide normal DST results.
Wet Goop is treated as the fallback result with priority below all named recipes.
Wet Goop is excluded from the lookup table because it would add noisy failure edges for many ingredients.

sources.name: Don't Starve Wiki Crock Pot page
